properties.data_quality_note: USGS groundwater field measurements are low-frequency site-visit measurements and may be provisional. Depth-to-water values use parameter 72019 when available and should be interpreted with well construction, datum, aquifer/screen interval, and measurement frequency.

properties.hist_percentile_note: Depth-to-water percentile uses prior measurements only when available; larger percentiles mean deeper groundwater. Seasonal percentile uses +/-45 water-day window; Feb. 29 is removed from the 365-day water-year index.
